model.name: packageScan
model.title: Package Scan
model.description: Scans Java packages on the classpath for RouteBuilder classes to auto-discover and register routes
model.label: configuration

package.description: Java package names to use for scanning for route builder classes.

excludes.label: advanced
excludes.description: Exclude finding route builder from these java package names.

includes.label: advanced
includes.description: Include finding route builder from these java package names.
